name: Tetro
description: Chunky arcade pieces built from four sliding blocks — every redraw rearranges each cluster into a new almost-tetromino.

code.style: --rule: ( /* one block plus three shadow copies on a unit lattice; offsets snap between unit multiples per seed */ --u: calc(190px / @Y); --pc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 14%; width: @var(--u); height: @var(--u); background: @var(--pc); box-shadow: calc(@var(--u) * @p(1, 1, 2)) 0 @var(--pc), calc(@var(--u) * @p(0, 1)) @var(--u) @var(--pc), calc(@var(--u) * @p(1, 2)) @var(--u) @var(--pc); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
